rootCause: A brief home power outage and network recovery allowed DHCP to reassign Raspberry Pi HA control-plane LAN IPs, exposing Sugarkube durable k3s/cluster configuration that coupled the cluster to raw DHCP IP addresses instead of stable .local node identities wherever possible.
resolution: Rotated the expired GHCR read PAT, confirmed Kubernetes API unreachability, rebuilt the disposable three-server HA k3s staging cluster across sugarkube3.local, sugarkube4.local, and sugarkube5.local, restored Traefik and Cloudflare tunnel routing, used fresh-cluster Helm install semantics, and verified the DSPACE v3.0.1-rc.5 staging deploy in a browser.
